name: color-by
description: Color-by modes for structural-element plot items. The available attributes depend on the concrete item type (beam, cable, shell, liner, pile, geogrid, or structure-node).

modes.description: Color structural objects by group, id, or name.
examples: color-by text-attribute "group" 'Any' color-options named maximum-names 1000000 name-controls true
color-by text-attribute "id" color-options named maximum-names 1000000 name-controls true

modes.description: Color structural nodes or elements by vector quantities.
Color structural elements by scalar result components.
modes.notes: Attribute names vary by structural element type and active model configuration.
